book.title: Clean Code
book.description: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship
book.excerpt: Even bad code can function. But if code isn't clean, it can bring a development organization to its knees.

book.title: Code Complete
book.description: A Practical Handbook of Software Construction
book.excerpt: Widely considered one of the best practical guides to programming.

book.title: The Pragmatic Programmer
book.excerpt: Straight from the trenches, The Pragmatic Programmer cuts through the increasing specialization.
